name: jot_lib.py: prepend jot_ to 4 underscore-prefixed funcs (insert _ separator)
_notes: Rule: skip names already starting with 'jot_' or '_jot_'. The remaining 4 are private (leading underscore) but lack the canonical '_jot_' separator.
Carve-outs: '_readSidecar' is renamed only inside jot_lib.py — util_lib.py defines its own unrelated '_readSidecar' that must not be touched, so util_lib is intentionally excluded from targets.
